summary: Re-verification after Phase 8 fixes. (1) All 11 phases3to8 tests now PASS (was 10/11). Full backend regression 153/153 PASS. (2) Frontend .env restored — login now works visually: POST hits /api/auth/login (NOT /undefined/api/auth/login), redirects to / dashboard, all data-testids verified visible in DOM: cn-new-btn, cn-mode-invoice, cn-mode-manual (CN modal), dn-new-btn, dn-mode-po, dn-mode-manual (DN modal as warehouse_manager), invoice_number (editable on issued TI detail). (3) CN inventory delta confirmed via public API: issuing a CN of qty=5 correctly increments product.hub_stock by 5, cancelling reverts. Phantom 'hub' rows fix verified for CN flows. HOWEVER — 2 CRITICAL bugs from iteration_6 are only PARTIALLY fixed: (A) routers_returns.py line 528 issue_debit_note still excludes warehouse_manager — warehouse user gets 403 on POST /api/debit-notes/{id}/issue (verified live with warehouse@servall.com); (B) routers_returns.py line 551 _adjust_stock(pid, -qty, 'hub', 'hub', ...) still uses location_id='hub' instead of 'hub-main' for debit_note destock on issue — meaning DN issue WILL recreate the phantom stock row bug for hub stock decrement (the cancel-reverse on line 575 is correctly 'hub-main', so DN issue→cancel will leave a -qty/+qty pair on two different rows). Lines 358, 383, 575 are correctly fixed.

critical.issue: routers_returns.py line 528 still says require_roles('super_admin','hub_accountant') — warehouse_manager is missing. Live test with warehouse@servall.com returns 403 'Insufficient permissions'. Review request claimed this was fixed. Fix: add 'warehouse_manager' to require_roles on line 528.

routers_returns.py line 551 still calls _adjust_stock(pid, -qty, 'hub', 'hub', 'debit_note', dnid, user). location_id should be 'hub-main' (matching the fix on lines 358, 383, 575). This will re-introduce the phantom-stock row bug on the destock path. Review request claimed all 4 sites (358, 383, 551, 575) were fixed — 551 was missed.

action_items: FIX #1 (CRITICAL): routers_returns.py line 528 — add 'warehouse_manager' to require_roles in issue_debit_note. Currently 403 for warehouse@servall.com.
FIX #2 (CRITICAL): routers_returns.py line 551 — change _adjust_stock(pid, -qty, 'hub', 'hub', ...) → 'hub', 'hub-main'. This is the same phantom-stock bug the rest of the file was fixed for.
After fixes: re-run `cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/test_iter7_warehouse_dn_and_stock.py -v` to confirm warehouse_manager DN issue→cancel passes AND hub_stock destock works on DN issue.
Optional: add a DN inventory-delta regression test parallel to test_cn_full_lifecycle_with_inventory_and_audit so future drift is caught.
critical_code_review_comments: Incomplete fix on line 551 — only 3 of 4 _adjust_stock callsites were corrected. Suggest extracting a constant CANONICAL_HUB_LOCATION_ID='hub-main' to prevent recurrence.

Role guard inconsistency persists: list/create/edit/get/pdf/cancel grant warehouse_manager; only ISSUE excludes it. Either grant uniformly or restrict uniformly — current state is confusing and breaks the documented workflow.

routers_returns.py wraps _adjust_stock in try/except logger.warning; failures silently log instead of failing the request. A logging.error with full traceback (or raising) would have caught both partial fixes.
Suggest invariant test: after each CN/DN issue, assert db.stock has exactly one row per (product_id, location_type='hub'). This would lock-in 'no phantom rows'.

success_rate.backend: 153/153 existing tests pass (incl. 11/11 phases3to8). New iter7 suite: 2/3 pass (warehouse_manager DN issue fails by design — surfaces the missed fix on line 528).
success_rate.frontend: Visually verified: login redirects /login→/, no /undefined URLs, CN/DN/TI pages load, all required data-testids present (cn-new-btn, cn-mode-*, dn-new-btn, dn-mode-*, invoice_number). UI smoke 100%.

test_credentials: admin@servall.com/Admin@123, warehouse@servall.com/Warehouse@123 — both valid and used live.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 TEST credit note (issued + cancelled inside test_credit_note_hub_stock_delta_uses_hub_main) — stock returned to original value. No other seed data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two-line backend fix remains. Then re-run `cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/test_iter7_warehouse_dn_and_stock.py tests/test_v23_phases3to8.py -v` for full DN/CN inventory + role coverage. Frontend was visually re-verified — no UI work pending. data-testids confirmed in DOM: cn-new-btn, cn-mode-invoice, cn-mode-manual, dn-new-btn, dn-mode-po, dn-mode-manual, invoice_number.
rca of the issue: Iteration 6 reported 4 occurrences of location_id='hub' (lines 358, 383, 551, 575) plus the warehouse_manager role gap on lines 528+563. Main agent's fix landed on 3 of 4 'hub'→'hub-main' rewrites (358/383/575) and 1 of 2 role-list additions (563). Lines 528 (issue_debit_note role) and 551 (debit_note issue destock location_id) were missed — confirmed by `grep -n _adjust_stock|require_roles routers_returns.py`. Re-running the previously-failing phases3to8 test still passes because (a) the CN inventory test uses CN paths (lines 358/383, both fixed) and (b) test_dn_full_lifecycle falls back to admin_client when warehouse gets 403 — masking the gap. Add explicit warehouse-only DN issue test (new iter7 suite) + DN inventory-delta test to lock-in.
